data.title: Victoria Must Go
data.synopsis: Hedvig and Henrik's new stepmother Victoria is annoying and constantly introducing new rules.  They decide to hire a hitman to get rid of her, and end up persuading a very reluctant immigrant, Carl, to do the job.

data.title: Three Times Nothing
data.synopsis: When three homeless friends win the lottery, they assume their lives are going to change drastically for the better. But claiming the money turns out to be more of a problem than a solution.

data.title: For A Moment, Forever
data.synopsis:
A young popstar overwhelmed by fame meets a troubled ex-rocker teaching music to
adolescents at a therapy centre. Both longing for love, they get closer as affection for music
connects them, but shall they overcome the burdens of his past?

data.title: Copperman
data.synopsis: Anselmo, an adult with the mental age of a child, fights evil and the criminals who threaten his country as Copperman, thanks to the special armor given to him by the local blacksmith.

data.title: The Broken Glass Theory
data.synopsis: Insurance claims investigator Claudio finds himself in a never-ending nightmare in a small town. For what seemed like a simple job, Claudios task now involves racing against the clock to discover the identity of the worst serial arsonist he has yet seen.

data.title: Hard Luck
data.synopsis: A family comes to the funeral of their beloved grandfather. After the burial it turns out that the numbers grandfather always bet at the lottery just won big, but the winning ticket was buried with him. The race for the buried ticket begins.

data.title: Run Woman Run
data.synopsis: When a steady diet of donuts, pizza, cake and cigarettes lands Beck in a diabetic coma, she receives a ghostly life coach in the form of legendary marathon hero Tom Longboat who helps her train for the run of her life.

data.title: On the Come up
data.synopsis: Bri, a young gifted rapper, strives to stay true to herself while breaking into the music industry.

data.title: The Black Minutes
data.synopsis: Vicente Rangel, a musician turned detective, embarks on a police case to catch a murderer of girls in a corrupt oil town on the Gulf of Mexico.

data.title: Unkind Ladies
data.synopsis: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

data.title: C Dans L'Air

data.title: Eat With David S1Episode 2
data.synopsis: Eat with David is a food and travel show, culinary travel series, where we take viewers on a global food adventures and travel destinations.

data.title: Dive In Tokyo
data.synopsis: The Kinshicho and Kameido area is an urban subcenter in eastern Tokyo. We go in search of celebrated scenic views, savor local flavors, and learn how a network of canals evolved into a logistics hub.

data.title: Journeys In Japan
data.synopsis: We visit Sugashima Island in Mie Prefecture, home to the legendary Ama, the women who free dive for the fruits of the sea, and discover a way of life tied to the sea.

data.title: Dining With The Chef
data.synopsis: Chef Saito introduces a dish often served on special occasions: fukusa-sushi. It's a visually appealing sushi, made by wrapping colorful ingredients and vinegared rice in a thin omelet.

data.synopsis: The host highlights talented individuals, elite events, and important updates from Belgium, showcasing achievements and breaking news that are making headlines and gaining global attention.

data.title: Mountain Men S12Mountain Marathon
data.synopsis: Tom begins the countdown to his 80th birthday. Jake and Anika tow a broken snowmobile down the mountain but run into fresh lion tracks and are back on the hunt. Paul sets out to take on a wolf pack.

data.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo S2Blasts From The Past
data.synopsis: From WWII bombs pulled from the sea to chemical weapons hidden beneath Washington D.C.-these explosive discoveries prove that history's blasts from the past can still shake our world.

data.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World S1A Whole New Ballgame
data.synopsis: The evolution of America's most beloved sports, baseball, basketball, and football, are made possible by the innovations of sporting goods pioneers named Spalding, Wilson, and the Rawlings brothers.

data.title: Aging In The WildLongevity
data.synopsis: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

data.title: DivasBarbra Streisand
